1/2 cup olive oil or melted butter

haricots-verts-and-freekeh-with-minty-ta.name: Haricots Verts And Freekeh With Minty Tahini Dressing

ingredients.item: Fresh cilantro leaves with tender stems
Fresh flat-leaf parsley leaves with tender stems
Aleppo pepper or crushed red pepper flakes

instructions: Cook freekeh in a large saucepan of salted simmering water until al dente, 12–15 minutes for cracked and 30–35 for uncracked. Drain and rinse under cold water; set aside.
Meanwhile, cook haricots verts in a small pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 4 minutes. Drain and transfer to a large bowl of ice water; let cool. Drain, then pat dry.
Whisk garlic, lemon juice, oil, tahini, mint, maple syrup, and 1 tsp. water in a large bowl; season with salt. Add freekeh and haricots verts and toss gently to coat; season with salt.
Serve freekeh and haricots verts topped with walnuts, cilantro, dill, parsley, and Aleppo pepper.
DO AHEAD: Freekeh and haricots verts can be cooked 2 days ahead. Cover and chill separately.

hearty-multigrain-seeded-bread.name: Hearty Multigrain Seeded Bread
instructions: Mix together warm water and sugar in a small bowl until sugar is dissolved; stir in yeast. Set aside until a creamy foam starts to form, about 5 minutes.

Combine bread flour, whole wheat flour, coconut oil, and salt in a food processor; pulse 4 times. Add chia seeds, wheat germ, flax seeds, millet, 1 tablespoon hemp seeds, 1 tablespoon sunflower seeds, and 1 tablespoon oats; pulse until incorporated.
Pour yeast mixture over flour mixture in the food processor; process until a dough ball forms, about 1 minute.
Turn dough into a well-oiled large bowl and cover with a damp towel; allow to rise in a warm area until doubled in size, about 1 hour.

Punch dough down and knead a few times. Form dough into an oblong shape and place in a greased loaf pan. Lightly press remaining 1 tablespoon hemp seeds, 1 tablespoon sunflower seeds, and 1 tablespoon oats onto the top of loaf. Cover with a damp towel and let rise in a warm area for 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake in the preheated oven until cooked through and crust is lightly browned, about 30 minutes. Cool bread in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.

hearty-potato-skillet.name: Hearty Potato Skillet
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to boil; add potatoes and boil until just tender, 7 to 10 minutes. Drain.

Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium to medium-high heat and cook sausage links. When cooked through, remove to a plate. Add bacon to the same skillet and cook to nearly your desired doneness. During the last few minutes, add cubed ham to crisp and heat through, 5 to 8 minutes. Remove bacon and ham with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels. Reserve grease.
Heat 1 tablespoon oil over medium-high heat in a large pot. Add onion and bell pepper; season lightly with salt and pepper. Cook and stir occasionally until tender, 10 to 15 minutes.
Place cooked potatoes in the skillet with the bacon grease over medium heat. Brown on all sides, turning gently as needed. Season potatoes with seasoned salt and pepper, to taste.
Melt butter in a separate skillet over medium heat. Fry eggs to your desired doneness.
Distribute browned potatoes among 4 plates. Top with bell pepper-onion mixture, and the meats. Sprinkle with Cheddar cheese and top each with a fried egg.

heidis-frying-pan-cookies.name: Heidi's Frying Pan Cookies
instructions: Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add dates, sugar, and eggs; cook and stir until mixture thickens and leaves the sides of the skillet, 5 to 10 minutes. Remove from heat; add crispy rice cereal and pecans. Stir cookie dough until well-mixed.
Place coconut in a shallow bowl. Drop teaspoonfuls of cookie dough into coconut and roll to coat and form into balls. Let cookies cool, about 20 minutes.

herb-crusted-pork-sirloin-roast.name: Herb-crusted Pork Sirloin Roast
instructions: Bring roast to room temperature by removing from the refrigerator 30 minutes before cooking.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Combine olive oil, garlic, thyme, sage, lemon zest, rosemary, salt, and pepper in a small bowl. Spread rub over roast until completely coated. Place on a rack in a roasting pan.
Roast in the preheated oven until slightly pink in the center, 45 to 60 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 66°C (66 degrees C).
Remove from the oven and tent loosely with foil. Allow to rest for 10 to 15 minutes before carving.

hibiscus-gt.name: Hibiscus G&t

ingredients.item: Fresh lime juice plus thinly sliced rounds

instructions: Combine sugar, hibiscus, ginger, and 1 cup water in a medium saucepan. Bring to a simmer (do not boil) over medium-high, stirring until sugar is dissolved. Remove from heat. Let steep 20 minutes until flavorful and bright.
Set a fine sieve over a medium heatproof bowl. Strain the mixture into the bowl; discard solids. Refrigerate hibiscus-ginger syrup until chilled, at least 30 minutes.

Fill the glass with ice. Pour in the Bombay Sapphire, 1 oz. of the hibiscus-ginger syrup, lime juice, and tonic water. Gently stir. Garnish with 1-2 thinly sliced lime rounds.

honey-bbq-pulled-pork-tacos.name: Honey Bbq Pulled Pork Tacos
instructions: Combine pork chops and broth in a slow cooker. Cook on High until meat can be easily shredded, about 4 hours.
Transfer meat to a cutting board and shred when cool enough to handle. Return to the slow cooker and set to Low.

Add barbecue sauce, black beans, and corn to the slow cooker. Stir until well combined. Cover and cook on Low until heated through, about 1 hour. Stir in 1/2 cup salsa. Taste and add more barbecue sauce or salsa if needed.
Serve filling in tortillas. Top with cotija cheese, lettuce, and tomato.

instructions: In a small bowl, add the olive oil, honey, stone ground mustard, Dijon mustard, lemon, garlic, salt, and pepper. Whisk until smooth.
Remove ½ of the marinade and refrigerate to use as a dressing.
Add chicken thighs to remaining marinade and let it marinate for two hours.
Add a teaspoon of olive oil to a nonstick pan. Sear chicken on each side until golden, crispy, and cooked through. Set aside and allow to rest.
Put lettuce in a large bowl, add tomatoes, red onions, avocado slices, and hard-boiled egg.
Slice chicken into strips and place in the salad.
Add the remaining marinade to the salad and toss.
Sprinkle bacon on top.
Enjoy!

Bake in the preheated oven until starting to brown, 15 to 20 minutes.

Reduce oven temperature to 218°C (220 degrees C). Dip 'wings' into the sauce and place back on the cookie sheet; continue baking for 10 to 15 minutes. Serve immediately.

Mix sugar and cinnamon. Sprinkle the fringes to stick with very well.
Enjoy!

how-to-make-zeppole-comedera.name: How To Make Zeppole
instructions: Hierve el agua con la mantequilla y sal.
Once tibia and butter and salt have been dissolved, add tipstick and blend strongly to form a homogenous mass.
Cocina de 2 a 3 minutos hasta que se despegue de las paredes.
Retira del fuego y deja enfriar.
Una vez templada, incorpora los huevos uno a uno y mezcla hasta que se integren.
Pasa la masa a una manga pastelera con boquilla rizada.
Warm a deep frying pan with vegetable oil.
On a baked or baked paper, forms the frying coils with double circles.
When oil reaches 170 ″ 3 ″, frying frying frits up to golden, it can take 3-4 minutes for you.
Once ready, remove from frying pan and run onto absorbing paper.
Give every frying dug an attic at the centre and fill with pastry cream.
Serves with glass sugar and bitter cherries.
Enjoy!

hummus-with-caramelized-fennel-argiro.name: Hummus With Caramelized Fennel
instructions: For vegan dip with humus and caramelized finocchio,
Cut the finocchio into frame first.
We put it in an anti-stick baking pan.
Salt and sprinkle with the olive oil.
Bake in a well preheated ocean at 200°C in the air, in the medium rack, for about 25 minutes, to Caramelize and brown.
This will give us the perfect result for humus with caramelized finocchio.
Allow the humus with caramelized finocchio to cool.
For the humus with caramelized finocchio
During the cooking, mix the finocchio to caramelize primarily on all sides.
Heat a small frying pan.
Cut the hazelnuts into nick pieces and make them for a few minutes to remove their flavors.
In a bowl, add the humus, add the flint, hazelnuts, the bumblebee.
Garnish with palm leaves and serve the humus with caramelized finocchio with salty crackers.

hungarian-cookies-teleculinaria.name: Hungarian Cookies

ingredients.item: Melted chocolate and powdered sugar to decorate

instructions: Coloque 3 gemas numa tigela e bata muito bem, juntamente com todos os outros ingredientes indicados.

Extend the dough, cut the biscuits in round shape, and dispose of them on a tray lined with vegetable paper. Brush them with the remaining yolk, previously beaten, and bring them to the oven, preheated at 180oC, until they are golden. Take it off and let it cool.
Dive part of the cookies in melted chocolate, covering only half of each cookie, and let it dry. Sprinkle others with powdered sugar and serve.
